security_summary: No critical issues were found in the current wallet session flow, but device-level validation and stronger storage hardening remain open.

findings.issue: Session state is persisted through standard app storage without an additional hardening layer.
findings.exploit_path: A compromised or rooted environment may expose persisted session material more easily than hardened storage would.
findings.remediation: Evaluate whether sensitive session fields should move to a stronger storage mechanism before production rollout.

verified_strengths: No secrets are hardcoded in repository source
Wallet connection flow is gated behind explicit session handling

verification.evidence: No hardcoded credentials found in scoped files

residual_risks: Production confidence remains limited until real-device wallet validation is completed
